## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature addresses.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you thought of and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or other supporting context.
